internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card product page and Flipkart SBI Card T&C booklet on 2026-06-08.

The live product page currently foregrounds a 12% off Cleartrip offer, but the detailed booklet continues to state 5% cashback on Cleartrip. The card data keeps the durable cashback structure and leaves promotional offer treatment out of the core rewards table.
The Flipkart booklet explicitly states quarterly cashback limits of Rs 4,000 for accelerated cashback categories, so the rewards rows use capStatementQuarter rather than a synthetic monthly cap.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-09.
